prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis of ferrocene was performed using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The Mulliken-derived Fukui functions and atomic indices were calculated directly. The atom with the highest electrophilic Fukui function (f⁺ = 0.22885456) and nucleophilic Fukui function (f⁻ = 0.25938191) was identified as the central Fe atom.
